channel.title: Bangladesh on My Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in Bangladesh on My Stream of Thoughts

item.title: How come someone can justify killing
item.description: <p> Both of them are very sad and at the same time significant. The first one is about Umar Bin Khattab(RA) and the second one is about Uthman Ibn Affan(RA). We all know that both of them were assassinated. </p> <p> Umar Bin Khattab (RA) was stabbed when he was praying Fajr and he fell unconscious right away. He was then carried to the house of his son Abdullah by some of the companions.

item.title: A great place to learn and mingle
item.description: <p> </p> <div style="clear: both; text-align: center;"> <a href="https://3.bp.blogspot.com/-VjSE7wC7sWU/WIiyGj6VjoI/AAAAAAAACU8/G7A_qxFlvREvA7aJMm0NiRRSxj5jQUvfwCLcB/s1600/936785_10201990445116485_528530179_n.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img loading="lazy" border="0" height="266" src="https://3.bp.blogspot.com/-VjSE7wC7sWU/WIiyGj6VjoI/AAAAAAAACU8/G7A_qxFlvREvA7aJMm0NiRRSxj5jQUvfwCLcB/s400/936785_10201990445116485_528530179_n.jpg" width="400" /></a> </div> <p> </div> <div style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; text-align: justify;"> The Java User Group Bangladesh (JUGBD) is now formed and successfully finished its 2nd meetup in last week. We are doing great, it’s not an exaggeration. </div> <div style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; text-align: justify;"> </div> <div style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; text-align: justify;"> For those who doesn’t know what is JUG, let me brief a little.
